description:
Notepad like text editor based on the Scintilla source code.

Notepad3 is a fast and light-weight Scintilla-based text editor with syntax highlighting. It has a small memory footprint, but is powerful enough to handle most programming jobs.
NEW:
- For "OpenCL", add "CL" extension in "C/C++ Source Code" Lexer.

CHANGES:
- FileChandedIndicator and FileDeletedIndicator may be 30 chars long.
- Rizonesoft Copyright © 2008-2024 to year "2008-2025".
- Correction of Rizonesoft's URL.

FIXES:
- Update Scintilla, fix issue IME zoom.
- Resolve regex library warnings.
- Fix link in zh_TW (MUI).
- Potential Vulnerability in Cloned Function.
- vc143 compiler issue for grepWin (GRE).
- Update Toolbar - check for changed Filename always.
- Titlebar changes (file name instead of simple hash).
- Reload arguments after changing own settings files.
- Utilize new Scintilla (v5.5.2) API SCI_SETCOPYSEPARATOR (SCI).
- Utilize Sci v5.5.2 new API SCI_GETUNDOSEQUENCE (SCI).
- Add missing symbol 'disabledelayedexpansion' in styleLexBAT (LEX).
- Recover cursor state when editor window loses focus.

REMOVED:

CHANGES Versions in Tools or Libraries:
- Update Lexilla Library (LEX) version 5.4.5 (2025-06-08).
- Update Scintilla Library (SCI) version 5.5.7 (2025-06-08).
- Update Oniguruma Regex (ONI) engine version 6.9.10 (2025/04/24).
- Update grepWinNP3 (GRE) version 2.1.15.48 (2024-01-10).
- Update MiniPath (MIN) version 1.0.2.191 (2022-12-13).
